subject: All aboard! Welcome to Railway!
body:
Thanks for trying out Railway, we’ve pulled together some information and resources to help you get started  

Railway Logo

*******************
full_body:
Thanks for trying out Railway, we’ve pulled together some information and resources to help you get started  

Railway Logo

*******************
Welcome to Railway!
*******************

We’re thrilled to have you on board.

Here are some resources to help you get started:

* Read the docs ( https://docs.railway.app/?utm_campaign=PLG+Onboarding+Campaign&utm_content=Welcome&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
* Create a project ( https://railway.app/new?utm_campaign=PLG+Onboarding+Campaign&utm_content=Welcome&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
* Deploy a template ( https://railway.app/templates?utm_campaign=PLG+Onboarding+Campaign&utm_content=Welcome&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

View the dashboard ( https://railway.app/dashboard?utm_campaign=PLG+Onboarding+Campaign&utm_content=Welcome&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Thanks,

Your friends at Railway

Unsubscribe from marketing emails ( https://railway.com/preferences?token=20ae3820-a6b7-42ab-8d13-f13c9e223cc3&utm_campaign=PLG+Onboarding+Campaign&utm_content=Welcome&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
